name: ihor-sokoliuk/mcp-searxng
description: An MCP server implementation that integrates the SearXNG API, providing web search capabilities.

tools.name: searxng_web_search
tools.description: Performs a web search using the SearXNG API, ideal for general queries, news, articles, and online content. Use this for broad information gathering, recent events, or when you need diverse web sources.

query.description: The search query. This is the main input for the web search

time_range.description: Time range of search (day, month, year)

language.description: Language code for search results (e.g., 'en', 'fr', 'de'). Default is instance-dependent.

safesearch.description: Safe search filter level (0: None, 1: Moderate, 2: Strict)

tools.name: web_url_read
tools.description: Read the content from an URL. Use this for further information retrieving to understand the content of each URL.
